description: At 0:26, the referee gives a yellow card to Enzo Fernandez. This is the 1st yellow card observed.
At 1:24, the referee gives a yellow card to Adrien Rabiot. This is the 2nd yellow card observed.
Scoreboard shows ARG 3 - 2 FRA at 115:46. This is the 2022 World Cup Final. I will look for yellow card events in this match.
